creator: dean@fragfest.com.au
text:
Unfortunately it seems that since 4.26 the ConnectX-3 network card is no longer supported (this commit https://github.com/Mellanox/mstflint/commit/52eb6c0ebbe8ad585da2a00c751260a025ad3f20) as reported here https://github.com/Mellanox/mstflint/issues/590 - and release notes where not properly updated. The change is far from trivial, its not just adding some pci-id's or similiar.

I am wondering if a 4.25 version could be maintained separately for cx-3 cards? As they are still a very capable 40GB card that are still running in production for many people and increasingly hitting the home market.
